summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex P2 features completed: (1) Section-level style variants with catalog API and variant picker modal, (2) Version History/Snapshots system with full CRUD, preview, restore, and auto-snapshot triggers, (3) AI snapshot intent detection ('ارجعلي للتصاميم السابقة' → show_snapshots action), (4) Drag-and-drop widget positioning with DragPositionCanvas. All 17 new feature tests + 27 regression tests passed (100%).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/websites/section-variants/catalog returns 5 section types (menu, gallery, testimonials, team, pricing) with 3+ variants each
Backend: Menu variants include grid, list, carousel with proper structure (id, label, description)
Backend: Gallery variants include grid, masonry, strip
Backend: PATCH /api/websites/client/sections/{id} with style='list' saves correctly
Backend: Public HTML renders with style classes
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/snapshots lists snapshots with total count
Backend: POST /api/websites/client/snapshots creates manual snapshot
Backend: GET /api/websites/client/snapshots/{id}/preview-html returns renderable HTML with label and created_at
Backend: POST /api/websites/client/snapshots/{id}/restore restores and creates pre-restore snapshot (undo capability)
Backend: DELETE /api/websites/client/snapshots/{id} removes snapshot
Backend: GET /api/websites/projects/{pid}/snapshots lists owner snapshots
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{pid}/snapshots creates owner snapshot
Backend: GET /api/websites/projects/{pid}/snapshots/{sid}/preview-html returns HTML
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{pid}/snapshots/{sid}/restore restores project
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{pid}/wizard/chat with 'ارجعلي للتصاميم السابقة' returns action.action='show_snapshots' (PRIORITY over AI)
Backend: AI snapshot intent detection works for multiple Arabic phrases
Backend: Section patch auto-creates snapshot
Frontend: Client Dashboard '📚 السجل' tab shows SnapshotsTab with version history
Frontend: SnapshotsTab shows 7 snapshots with labels (manual/AI/auto), preview and restore buttons
Frontend: Snapshot preview modal shows full website preview in iframe with 'استعد هذا التصميم' button
Frontend: Content tab shows sections with variant picker buttons (palette icon) for menu, gallery
Frontend: Variant picker modal shows 3 variant cards (شبكة بصور, قائمة أنيقة, شريط أفقي) with descriptions
Frontend: Widget Customizer (الأدوات tab) shows DragPositionCanvas with draggable chip
Frontend: Widget position controls include shape options, position grid, and offset inputs
Frontend: Website Studio '📚 السجل' topbar button opens SnapshotsGalleryModal
Frontend: SnapshotsGalleryModal shows sidebar list with snapshot items and main iframe preview
Frontend: AI chat 'ارجعلي للتصاميم السابقة' triggers show_snapshots action and opens modal
Regression: All 27 existing tests passed (auth, orders, customers, drivers, coupons, loyalty, PWA)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully tested: (1) Section Variants - GET /api/websites/section-variants/catalog returns 5 types (menu/gallery/testimonials/team/pricing) × 3+ variants. PATCH /client/sections/{id} with {data:{style:'list'}} saves style. Frontend variant picker modal at data-testid='variant-modal' with variant cards. (2) Snapshots/Version History - MAX_SNAPSHOTS=30, stored in project.snapshots[]. Client endpoints: /client/snapshots (list/create), /client/snapshots/{id}/preview-html, /client/snapshots/{id}/restore, DELETE. Owner endpoints: /projects/{pid}/snapshots/*. Auto-snapshot triggers: wizard/answer, apply-variant, section patch, AI chat. Pre-restore snapshot auto-created for undo. (3) AI Intent - detect_snapshot_intent() in ai_service.py catches Arabic phrases like 'ارجعلي للتصاميم السابقة' and returns action='show_snapshots' with PRIORITY over AI interpretation. (4) Widget Positioning - DragPositionCanvas in ClientDashboard.js allows drag-and-drop positioning with snap-to-anchor. All Arabic UI strings present.

snapshots.client_list: Working - returns snapshots array with total
snapshots.auto_triggers: Working - wizard/answer, apply-variant, section patch, AI chat

ai_snapshot_intent.priority: Working - takes PRIORITY over AI interpretation
